title: chorisanthera pumila
intro: Chorisanthera pumila, also known as the dwarf yellow starvine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chorisanthera pumila are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
